slice: Scene Aspect Ratio dropdown replaces the read-only top-bar glance chip and retires the separate Scene Configuration Inspector panel. Working View / Runtime Preview canvases fixed to genuinely hug the Scene's own Aspect Ratio -- removed a mismatched-shape background box that used to surround the correctly-sized card. Fixed a real space-allocation bug where Runtime Preview could collapse to zero height in stacked dock on a short viewport (Working View's canvas wrap is now shrinkable instead of forcing its sibling to zero). Check & Build's Thumbnail/Hero Image validation error/warnings now show a working Fix Now button pointing at World Settings. Experience Inspector's Text/Image/Graphics/Colour sections are now self-contained bordered cards (icon+title header, compact Hosted By/Usage/Make Public footer) matching the approved Authoring view reference. Full regression (goldenBuild.js 30/30 + Playwright Workspace smoke suite) passes unchanged throughout; zero console errors.
